title: URL State 第二阶段
goal: 让 /skills URL 能还原真实证据上下文，包括 diff pair、history filters/comparison、eval target/case、audit filters 和 promotion review。
scope: 新增 parseWorkbenchUrlState/workbenchUrlForState 统一 query 契约
让 server page 和 client workbench 复用同一 URL state 解析逻辑
同步 eval_target 和 selected case
同步 run filters、selected run、baseline/candidate comparison 和 matrix controls
将 diff 和 promotion 加载改为 state-driven effects
新增 Playwright E2E 覆盖刷新恢复和 Back/Forward
更新 README、产品体验评审、完成度审计、摩擦审计、任务日志和本任务规格/计划
out_of_scope: 把未提交 pass/fail 草稿写入 URL
把批量 case 或表单草稿写入 URL
把 viewed progress 写入 URL
组织级 audit URL 设计
verification: Red: cd apps/web && UV_CACHE_DIR=/Users/xx/Documents/code/skills-manager/.uv-cache npx playwright test e2e/url-state.spec.ts --project=chromium -> failed as expected because eval_target and promotion params were not written
